# Metrics


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

This page documents and tests the main error metrics in
`peshbeen.metrics`.

Main symbols:

- [`peshbeen.metrics.MAPE`](https://mustafaslanCoto.github.io/peshbeen/modules/metrics.html#mape)
- [`peshbeen.metrics.MAE`](https://mustafaslanCoto.github.io/peshbeen/modules/metrics.html#mae)
- `peshbeen.metrics.SMAE`
- [`peshbeen.metrics.MSE`](https://mustafaslanCoto.github.io/peshbeen/modules/metrics.html#mse)
- [`peshbeen.metrics.RMSE`](https://mustafaslanCoto.github.io/peshbeen/modules/metrics.html#rmse)
- `peshbeen.metrics.SRMSE`
- `peshbeen.metrics.RMSSE`
- [`peshbeen.metrics.SMAPE`](https://mustafaslanCoto.github.io/peshbeen/modules/metrics.html#smape)
- `peshbeen.metrics.MASE`
- `peshbeen.metrics.CFE`
- `peshbeen.metrics.CFE_ABS`
- [`peshbeen.metrics.WMAPE`](https://mustafaslanCoto.github.io/peshbeen/modules/metrics.html#wmape)

## Percentage Metrics

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/mustafaslanCoto/peshbeen/blob/main/peshbeen/metrics.py#L17"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### MAPE

``` python

def MAPE(
    y_true:ArrayLike, # Actual values.
    y_pred:ArrayLike, # Predicted values.
)->float: # Mean absolute percentage error.

```

*Calculate mean absolute percentage error.*

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>y_true</td>
<td>ArrayLike</td>
<td>Actual values.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>y_pred</td>
<td>ArrayLike</td>
<td>Predicted values.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>float</strong></td>
<td><strong>Mean absolute percentage error.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

``` python
y_true = [100, 200, 300]
y_pred = [90, 210, 330]
test_eq(MAPE(y_true, y_pred), 0.08)
test_fail(lambda: MAPE([1, 2], [1]), contains="same length")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/mustafaslanCoto/peshbeen/blob/main/peshbeen/metrics.py#L30"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### SMAPE

``` python

def SMAPE(
    y_true:ArrayLike, # actual values
    y_pred:ArrayLike, # predicted values
)->float: # symmetric mean absolute percentage error in percent

```

*Calculate symmetric mean absolute percentage error.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 38%" />
<col style="width: 52%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>y_true</td>
<td>ArrayLike</td>
<td>actual values</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>y_pred</td>
<td>ArrayLike</td>
<td>predicted values</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>float</strong></td>
<td><strong>symmetric mean absolute percentage error in
percent</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

``` python
test_eq(round(SMAPE(y_true, y_pred), 2), 8.31)
test_fail(lambda: SMAPE([1, 2], [1]), contains="same length")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/mustafaslanCoto/peshbeen/blob/main/peshbeen/metrics.py#L44"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### WMAPE

``` python

def WMAPE(
    y_true:np.ndarray | list | pd.Series, # actual values
    y_pred:np.ndarray | list | pd.Series, # predicted values
)->float: # weighted mean absolute percentage error

```

*Calculate weighted mean absolute percentage error.*

``` python
test_eq(round(WMAPE(y_true, y_pred), 3), 0.083)
test_fail(lambda: WMAPE([1, 2], [1]), contains="same length")
```

### MAE

``` python
def MAE(
    y_true:np.ndarray | list | pd.Series, # actual values
    y_pred:np.ndarray | list | pd.Series, # predicted values
)->float: # mean absolute error

```

### MSE

``` python

def MSE(
    y_true:np.ndarray | list | pd.Series, # actual values
    y_pred:np.ndarray | list | pd.Series, # predicted values
)->float: # mean squared error

```

*Calculate mean squared error.*

``` python
test_eq(round(MSE(y_true, y_pred), 2), 366.67)
test_fail(lambda: MSE([1, 2], [1]), contains="same length")
```

### RMSE

``` python

def RMSE(
    y_true:ArrayLike, y_pred:ArrayLike
)->float:

```

*Calculate Root Mean Square Error (RMSE).*

Returns:
